_comment: M13 attribution head — frozen linear classifier over 30 ATV subfields. Hand-tuned weights matching observed v2.x firewall verdicts; v3.x will replace with weights learned from labelled (ATV, verdict) pairs collected via Burn-in Shadow phase. Bit-identical inference once frozen — IEEE-754 float32 dot product + max + threshold.

named_slot_weights._comment: Aggregator boost for slots with semantic meaning — multiplicative on the slot value before subfield sum.

thresholds._comment: v1.1 (2026-05-03): require_approval raised 0.40 -> 0.55. Empirically the original threshold over-blocked benign Bash (e.g. 'ls -la /tmp' scored 0.46). New separation: benign Bash 0.40-0.50 ALLOW (escalates to local-phi via hybrid), suspicious 0.55-0.70 REQUIRE_APPROVAL, destructive 0.70+ BLOCK. Verified against the 7-scenario regression suite — all 7 still PASS at 0.55.

_provenance.tuned_by: hand-tuned to match v2.4 12-incident KPI + v2.3 hw simulator attacks
_provenance.training_data: none (rule-based scaffold for v3.0 hybrid combiner)
_provenance.intended_replacement: weights learned from labelled audit/intent_log pairs in v3.x
